title: Demo Screenshot Surrogate Evaluation Report
executive_summary: Demo screenshot surrogate evaluation completed using Markdown .screen.md inputs only. The run demonstrates optional UI semantic extraction and screenshot evidence coverage, not real image or OCR capability.

capability_results.notes: Surrogate-only demo; real visual capability is not graded.
Demo output uses screen evidence handles.

redline_results.description: Demo explicitly declares surrogate_only and does not claim real image/OCR capability.

score_caps.reason: Only screenshot surrogate Markdown files were used; real image/OCR/layout capability was not tested.

key_findings: Five screenshot surrogate pages were processed in the demo.
UI-derived claims cite screen evidence handles.
Button actions remain candidates pending fusion with code/documents.
risks: Demo output is not a customer-site readiness result.
Surrogate-only evaluation can be misread as real visual understanding if not labeled clearly.

recommendations.description: Run B4/B5/B6 with real tool outputs before using screenshot surrogate capability in a pilot.

conclusion.rationale: The demo validates result packaging and optional screenshot evidence mechanics, but does not evaluate real customer tools or real image capability.
next_steps: Use Task 08 with an actual tool under evaluation.
Complete human review before any readiness claim.
